transcript.text:
[King of Steak: Tomahawk] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[To pair it with Pasta!]
[Delivery is here]
[This is all delivery food?!]
[All these dishes to enjoy at home?]
[My house becoming a restaurant]
[Must have good food at home too!]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some steak
This place is a delivery-based restaurant
They provides this space for me to enjoy the food fresh
So they will get it to me here
This spot is called "Steak Zone & Pasta"
You have to look at the menu from the delivery app
Ta-da Steak Zone & Pasta
What to eat? Steak for sure, right?

They have tomahawk? Let's eat that
There are a lot of delivery-based restaurants there days And they do a great job
Garnish Up Steak, Shrimp Aglio Olio,
Haejang (hangover cure) Pasta?
Basil Pasta, I like the smell of basil
Gopchang (beef small intestine) Pasta, Truffle Mushroom Pasta,
Daechang (beef large intestines) rice too I've been hooked on it
Order complete
[Tomahwak Potato Fries Combo]
[Garnish Up Steak]
[Daechang Rice] (Beef Large Intestines)
[Basil Cream Pasta]
[Truffle Mushroom Pasta]
[Gopchang Tomato Pasta] (Beef Small Intestines)
[Seafood Tomato Stew Pasta] (Hangover Cure)
[Shrimp Aglio Olio Pasta]

-Your order is here -Thank you
Wow the tomahawk is huge
Thank you
All the food is here
There are so many restaurants that deliver delicious foods these days
So you can enjoy something like this at home
Although this isn't my home... But I really like that feature
What should I start with? Everything looks so good
This is the mushroom pasta
This is the Haejang Pasta (Hangover Cure)
Gopchang Pasta (Beef small intestines)
Basil pasta
Shrimp Aglio Olio
Daechang over rice looks good too (Beef large intestines)
This is the Top Blade
This is the Tomahawk It's huge!

Bigger than I thought
Thin, but wide
This is a cool straw
Nice
Steak first? Since it's "Steak Zone & Pasta"?
It's been a while, so I'm excited
Potato fries
These thick-cut fries are so yummy
I should eat this as a whole, right?
Let's put on the gloves
Thank you
Spicy sauces
Let's eat this as a whole
Bon appetit
So juicy
It took a while to set everything up

So I thought the meat would be cold and dry, but it's very tender
It's got a great consistency Very moist
The meat juice goes crazy
But...
It's so cool that you can enjoy a Tomahawk steak at home from delivery
The price was very cost-efficient too
because Tomahawks are usually expensive
Inexpensive and huge
Delicious
I shouldn't finish this right now
Wait here!
Some top blade meat There's a candle here keeping the dish warm
Looks good It's very soft
This is it!
This is the quality of delivery-food?
I love the texture of the meat

Very soft
The sauces are interesting... With some whole-grain mustard
Interesting!
It's tasty!
I really want some pasta now
It's hard to pick
I can't choose...
I feel like I need to start with something light first Aglio Olio
Shrimp Aglio Olio
This could be a spicy sauce
Over here...
Get 1 shrimp
Every dish here is seasoned perfectly
Delicious!
It's almost all gone already
That's really good!

Gopchang! This is a very unusual combination
I've never seen it before
This is really gopchang
Gopchang pasta? I can't even imagine
The sauce goes really well with the gopchang texture
Surprisingly, pasta goes really well with gopchang
It's not too chewy either
And they give you a lot of gopchang
Goes well together
Next next
I have to eat some cream
This just looks scrumptious The colors are great
If it's too white, it's too creamy
And it's not that good
Dark creamy colors never go wrong
This is #1

It's so good
If the truffle flavor overpowers everything, the dish will taste artificial
But this is about right
The cream is very delicious
It's a thick creamy sauce
[You can hear it...]
Really good
1 bite of steak
What's this? Hot sauce?
That's spicy
Steak is seasoned really well, so sauce isn't even needed
There's this and the basil pasta, Let's try the basil one
It's green It's screams "I'm basil"
It's refreshing
This is perfect for all the basil-lovers
But this is delivery food

It took a while for all the food to come out and to set up
So they have been sitting here for a while
But the noodles are not soggy at all
It's great Even if they're cold
Next,
Haejang Pasta It looks excellent
Isn't this the black tiger shrimp?
The sauce looks spicy but delicious
I can tell why it's called Haejang pasta (Hangover cure)
It gives off that feeling
This would be great with alcohol Like wine
No, maybe soju too
It's like a refreshing stew
The noodles are still fresh
The noodles are still good
Hangover cure with pasta is possible now

It's all gone...
Aglio Olio
It still tastes great
It wasn't just the first bite
It's going away too quickly
This is perfect for a house party
Order different dishes
It comes in a box like this
For a house party...
All the pastas are tasty
Personally, the #1 dish is...
I can't choose...
Mushroom
Shrimp Aglio Olio is good too
Basil too
I forgot about the rice

Break up the egg yolk
Over-rice dishes don't really need to be mixed
But this dish needs to be mixed
Mix it well like this
It's not too greasy
Flavorful
Tasty!
This has been sitting here for such a long time And it's still amazing
It's not dry at all
Gopchang...
Melts in my mouth
Lots-of-gopchang pasta
Can't forget about the sauce
I ate a chili pepper
That's really spicy
I need some meat now

There's no more left, right? I'm scared
Tomahawk
I'm not applying too much force and it cuts well
Steak is always so good
I wonder if it's still good
The noodles aren't bloated
It's probably been an hour too
[Just eat]
Wait,
There's not much food left
That's all?
Let's eat the Black Tiger Shrimp
I need to use my hands
Some rice
Seasoned so well
Let's prep the mussels

Shrimp, mussel, clam
I got none of them
This sauce is a must It should go well with rice too
I saved this for last because it's so good
Truffles lose taste over time though...
Tasty
It's so good
Making tteokboki with this sauce would be incredible
Let's finish it up
I look like a bandit
The rib fingers are tasty Not chewy at all
Why did I order the "Garnish Up"?
I shouldn't have
Asp.. Aspa... (Asparagus)
I'll have 1 tomato
I ordered the wrong dish

[Steaks cleared]
Truffle sauce!
Cream sauce
The sauces are great
[The fries are gone too...]
I finished all the pastas here...
But it was so good, so I kinda want 1 more
Let's order one for to-go
Since it was still fresh after some time It should be good to eat at home too
Which one though?
They have Toowoomba Pasta (Creamy pasta with prawns)
Let's order that one for to-go
A perfect timing for Toowoomba
Select it...
Order!
[Toowoomba Pasta complete!]

[Cleaning everything up while she waits...]
1 last bite
[Corn for dessert]
Your order is ready!
Thank you
Toowoomba
I will eat this one at home
They have the quality of a restaurant
It's just that good
I like how everyone can now enjoy "restaurant" quality foods from home for cheaper
Thanks everyone!
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Adam's Regional Children's Welfare Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
